body.title: agent_datacenter: browser-use shim (gated on device ticket)
body.result: BrowserUseShim shipped; self_test fast-paths without Chrome launch
body.description:
BrowserUseShim — lifecycle management for browser-use. Gated on T-adc-browser-use-device. Full spec at implementation time.

Proposed shape:
- Determined by spike question 2 (own shim vs generic automation shim pattern)
- agent_datacenter/devices/browser_use/shim.py: BrowserUseShim(BaseShim)
- 'restart' semantics per spike question 3

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/browser_use/shim.py (post-spike)

Design rules: oop-first, spec at implementation time

Scope boundary: IN: BrowserUseShim per spike findings. OUT: browser automation logic (lives in device.py)

Test plan: TBD per spike. BrowserUseShim() instantiates; self_test() returns {passed: bool, details: str}
